data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. MISS SPRITZ was well fancied in betting last start but could only manage 1.5 lengths away in third (19.84). Some good form is emerging from her last run. Overdue and gets her chance. 6. FORTUNE HEARTS jumped a wide draw and ran into the minors when third by 6 lengths (26.34) at Q Lakeside in Grade 6. Failed to fire only run here. Leading player again. 2. MAKE 'EM RAIN broke his maiden last start by 0.8 lengths at this track over 350m (19.53). Boxed well here. Harder here but expected to feature again. 1. BLACK IS BACK missed the placings here last start but is well-placed to turn the form around.","runners":[7,6,2,1],"exclusive":false}
